overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character travels from a covered walkway under an elevated highway, crosses a street, and continues along an open urban sidewalk with passing vehicles and towering buildings adorned with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing yellow structural pillars and illuminated vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: large concrete support columns painted yellow holding up the elevated highway above
row of illuminated automated vending machines with glowing displays
underside of the elevated highway structure creating a covered walkway
illuminated commercial signage on the building facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban walkway beneath an elevated highway, flanked by yellow structural pillars. The right side features glowing vending machines and shop fronts with neon signage, while sparse pedestrian traffic moves through the semi-enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between covered walkway and open street intersection

events.description: passing a group of NPCs gathered near a building entrance with a fire pit
approaching the end of the covered walkway, bright neon signs visible ahead indicating open street

agents.ego_description: continuing through the walkway while approaching an intersection, passing by NPCs congregated near a building entrance

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and sitting near a building entrance with a small fire

entered.detail: cluster of characters gathered near a building entrance with warm lighting
closed corrugated metal security shutters on storefronts
marked pedestrian crossing leading across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper under the overpass, passing a group of NPCs gathered near a warmly lit building entrance. The environment transitions toward an open intersection, with metal shutters and bright neon signage becoming visible at the walkway's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with wet pavement and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the covered walkway and steps onto the wet street crosswalk
vehicles pass by on the right as the character crosses the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street from the covered walkway to the opposite sidewalk, navigating around moving traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the street with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying a human figure high above the street
dark reflective street surface with puddles reflecting the neon lights
white and red concrete dividers separating the road lanes

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway onto a wet street crosswalk, entering the open urban environment. A massive holographic billboard floats above the intersection while vehicles pass by on the right, their headlights reflecting off the damp asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with towering neon-lit buildings

events.description: large holographic billboard changes content or perspective as the character moves

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing by illuminated storefronts and building signage

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated signage reading 'YOU CAN TRUST' in white letters
spray-painted graffiti tags on the concrete wall beside the sidewalk
towering high-rise buildings with glass facades and numerous illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along an open city sidewalk beside a busy multi-lane road, with towering futuristic skyscrapers rising on both sides. The 'YOU CAN TRUST' building sign is visible ahead, while graffiti-covered walls and neon storefronts line the pedestrian path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered urban underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched openness of a futuristic city center. It begins by trailing the character through a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing yellow structural pillars and glowing vending machines. As the character moves deeper under the overpass, the semi-enclosed space opens up toward a brightly lit intersection marked by metal shutters and vibrant signage. The scene then shifts as the character emerges onto a wet street crosswalk, where the environment expands to reveal a massive floating holographic billboard and vehicles reflecting off the damp asphalt. Finally, the camera proceeds along an open sidewalk beside a busy multi-lane road, moving past graffiti-covered walls toward towering skyscrapers and a prominent sign reading YOU CAN TRUST.
